seoTitle: Merriangaah vs Merricumbene — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Merriangaah and Merricumbene. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Merriangaah and Merricumbene.
heading: Merriangaah vs Merricumbene — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Merriangaah, New South Wales and Merricumbene, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Merriangaah has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Merricumbene (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Merriangaah or Merricumbene safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Merriangaah has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Merricumbene scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Merriangaah scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Merricumbene scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Merriangaah or Merricumbene?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Merriangaah has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
